description:
The Civil Aviation Authority requires a safety audit of your drone fleet's operational area. You need to determine the geographical bounding box (minimum and maximum latitude/longitude) that encompasses ALL waypoints from ALL currently registered Flight Plans in the system.

Your task:
1. Explore the Aerobridge codebase (located in `/opt/aerobridge`) to identify the Flight Plan model and how it stores geometry/coordinate data.
2. Write a Python script (e.g., `/home/ga/calc_bounds.py`) that queries all Flight Plans via the Django ORM and calculates the global minimum and maximum latitude and longitude across all coordinates in the fleet.
3. Save the result as a JSON file to `/home/ga/operational_bounds.json` with the following format:
